title: hieracium olivaceum subsp. canillosum
intro: Hieracium olivaceum subsp. canillosum, a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and skin irritations, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. The herbal preparations of Hieracium olivaceum subsp. canillosum include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
